---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
labels: enhancement
---

## Is This on the Roadmap?

Check [README.md Roadmap](../../README.md#roadmap) first. If yes, feel free to offer to implement it.

## Problem or Need

What problem does this solve? Who needs it?

## Proposed Solution

How would you like it to work? Commands? Buttons? Automatic?

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, examples, or references.
